---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "Research, data work, and side projects — things I've built or contributed to. Site building is in progress!"
listing:
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  fields: [image, title, description, categories]
  sort: "date desc"
  image-height: 200px
  categories: true
page-layout: full
toc: false
---
